temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a pale, gaunt man with long, white hair. He is wearing a dark, high-collared robe. His face is contorted in a scream, his mouth wide open, revealing his teeth. The background is dark and rocky, illuminated by a cool, blue-green light. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The audio begins with a high-pitched, agonized, and prolonged scream, filled with terror and pain. The camera cuts to a wide shot from behind two figures standing on a rocky, desolate landscape. The figure on the left, silhouetted, is a large, imposing figure in a long, flowing robe. The figure on the right is also silhouetted, facing the larger one. A massive, bright, and turbulent energy explosion erupts between them, filling the frame with a swirling, ethereal light. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. This is immediately followed by a powerful, whooshing sound that builds in intensity, like a massive, magical energy blast being unleashed. The sound is deep and resonant, creating a sense of immense power and destructive force. The view shifts to a high-angle, wide shot of a dark, circular clearing. In the center, two figures are engaged in a confrontation. One figure, silhouetted, is on the ground, while the other, also silhouetted, stands over them. A bright, white light, like a beam of energy, cuts across the scene from the right. A large crowd of figures in dark robes stands in a circle around the clearing, watching the event unfold. The "风行网" watermark is still present. The camera zooms in for a close-up on the face of an older woman. Her face is filled with terror and shock, her eyes wide and her mouth slightly agape. She is looking slightly off-camera. The background is dark and out of focus. The "风行网" watermark is visible in the top right corner. The audio then cuts to a sharp, crackling, and sizzling noise, reminiscent of a powerful electrical discharge or a magical spell being cast.
